hero.headline: Welcome to Surf Side
hero.subheadline: Live well at Surf Side in beautiful Charleston, SC

about.title: Live Well at Surf Side
about.description: Surf Side offers the perfect blend of coastal living, comfort, and community. Enjoy modern homes with premium finishes, beach access, and resort-style amenities just steps from the best of Charleston, SC.

amenities.title: Premium Amenities
amenities.description: Experience resort-style living with our extensive amenity package.

floorplans.title: Our Floor Plans
floorplans.description: Spacious layouts designed for coastal living

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to find your new home? Contact us today to schedule a tour.

cta.title: Ready to Make Surf Side Home?
cta.description: Schedule a tour today and discover your perfect home by the water.
